creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Update:

I have run through the same steps with a a FreeBSD 14.0-BETA3 jail under py39-iocage-1.2_10, without issue. Please do share what additional configuration settings you might have. The connecting clients may also have an impact.

iocage create -n prosody ip4_addr="re0|10.0.0.104/24" -r 14.0-BETA3

(Start, add pkg, configure as mentioned)
